category_sources: source_facts.description says passphrases to remember; official README says diceware generates passphrases from wordlists using random sources.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is diceware; official GitHub repository title is ulif/diceware and README heading is diceware.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to diceware.readthedocs.io as documentation and includes usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to https://github.com/ulif/diceware; official repository README links sources to the same GitHub project.
tags_sources: Official README describes passphrase generation, wordlists, random sources, and CLI usage; source_facts.description summarizes passphrases.
